# Vault: Playbooks

Step-by-step operational procedures live here.
Every file is `type: Playbook`.

| Title | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| [Author GHA Composite Action](author-gha-composite-action.md) | Scaffold and validate a new composite action under actions/{category}/{name}/. |
| [Bootstrap SPVS Dev Environment](bootstrap-spvs-dev-environment.md) | Install local hooks and scanners for gha-reusable-actions-workflows development. |
| [Maintain aegis-system](maintain-aegis-system.md) | How to add or update concepts, playbooks, references, scripts, and skills in the aegis-system OKF vault — with post-change verification. |
| [Release GHA Component](release-gha-component.md) | Run Release Manager mode release/promote/rollback for a monorepo component. |
| [Run GHA Local Policy Tests](run-gha-local-policy-tests.md) | Execute Conftest verify/scan and policy unit tests for the monorepo. |
